name: skepticcode
description: Adversarial code audit skills for Claude Code — YAGNI, KISS, DRY driven

plugins.name: skeptic-code
plugins.description: Adversarial code audit driven by YAGNI, KISS, and DRY. Two-pass audit separates existence checks (should this code be here?) from safety checks (is this code dangerous?). Eight suspects: ghost, prophet, liar, twin, stranger, oracle, cliff, wheel.
